texto: Regret and pangs of conscience are feelings we assign to others to make the world seem a little more fair, to even things out a little and provide consolation. In reality, those who do wrong to us never think about us as much as we think about them, and that is the ultimate irony: their deeds live inside us, festering, while they live out in the world, plucking peaches off trees, biting juicily into them, their minds on things lovely and sweet.
explicacao: Citação de Samuel Park sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Regret and pangs of conscience are feelings we assign to others to make the world seem a little m…” articula reflexao, irony, others em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como others e regret.

texto: We're only given one life, and it's the one we live, she had thought; how painful now, to realize that wasn't true, that you would have different lives, depending on how brave you were, and how ready.
explicacao: Citação de Samuel Park sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “We're only given one life, and it's the one we live, she had thought; how painful now, to realize…” articula vida, life-changing, love em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como termino e life-changing.

texto: Why are we asked to make the most important decisions of our lives when we are so young, and so prone to mistakes?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Samuel Park que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “Why are we asked to make the most important decisions of our lives when we are so young, and so p…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, choices-and-consequences, youth, com foco em vida e youth.
